name: Venison Barbecue
recipeInstructions:
1. Sear a 3-pound venison roast in a frying pan.
2. Mix the remaining ingredients (catsup, salt, Worcestershire sauce, vinegar, butter, cinnamon, lemon slices, and allspice) in a saucepan. Bring the mixture to a boil, stirring occasionally to avoid burning. Simmer for 10 minutes.
3. Cover the venison with the sauce and roast it in a moderate oven (350 degrees F.) for 1 1/2 to 2 hours, turning the meat occasionally.
